<h2 data-i18n-en="Metric" data-i18n-zh="指标">Metric</h2>

<p><em data-i18n-en="World record history and current rankings for various derived metrics computed from a round's 5 solves." data-i18n-zh="从一轮 5 次成绩中计算的各类指标的世界纪录历史与排名。">World record history and current rankings for various derived metrics computed from a round's 5 solves.</em></p>
<div class="metric-tab-wrap" data-tab-mode="global">
<div class="metric-dropdown">
  <button class="metric-dropdown-trigger" onclick="toggleMetricDropdown()">
    <span data-i18n-en="Single" data-role="trigger-text">Single</span>
    <span class="arrow">▼</span>
  </button>
  <div class="metric-dropdown-panel">
    <div class="metric-dropdown-group-label" data-i18n-en="Basic" data-i18n-zh="基本">Basic</div>
    <div class="metric-dropdown-items">
      <button class="metric-dropdown-item active" data-id="single" data-i18n-en="Single" onclick="selectFromDropdown('single')">Single</button>
      <button class="metric-dropdown-item" data-id="average" data-i18n-en="Average" onclick="selectFromDropdown('average')">Average</button>
    </div>
    <div class="metric-dropdown-group-label" data-i18n-en="Composite" data-i18n-zh="复合">Composite</div>
    <div class="metric-dropdown-items">
      <button class="metric-dropdown-item" data-id="bao5" data-i18n-en="BAo5" onclick="selectFromDropdown('bao5')">BAo5</button>
      <button class="metric-dropdown-item" data-id="wao5" data-i18n-en="WAo5" onclick="selectFromDropdown('wao5')">WAo5</button>
      <button class="metric-dropdown-item" data-id="mo5" data-i18n-en="Mo5" onclick="selectFromDropdown('mo5')">Mo5</button>
      <button class="metric-dropdown-item" data-id="bpa" data-i18n-en="BPA" onclick="selectFromDropdown('bpa')">BPA</button>
      <button class="metric-dropdown-item" data-id="wpa" data-i18n-en="WPA" onclick="selectFromDropdown('wpa')">WPA</button>
    </div>
    <div class="metric-dropdown-group-label" data-i18n-en="Distribution" data-i18n-zh="分布">Distribution</div>
    <div class="metric-dropdown-items">
      <button class="metric-dropdown-item" data-id="median" data-i18n-en="Median" onclick="selectFromDropdown('median')">Median</button>
      <button class="metric-dropdown-item" data-id="bestc" data-i18n-en="Best Counting" onclick="selectFromDropdown('bestc')">Best Counting</button>
      <button class="metric-dropdown-item" data-id="worstc" data-i18n-en="Worst Counting" onclick="selectFromDropdown('worstc')">Worst Counting</button>
      <button class="metric-dropdown-item" data-id="worst" data-i18n-en="Worst" onclick="selectFromDropdown('worst')">Worst</button>
      <button class="metric-dropdown-item" data-id="variance" data-i18n-en="Variance" onclick="selectFromDropdown('variance')">Variance</button>
      <button class="metric-dropdown-item" data-id="ratio" data-i18n-en="Best/Avg" onclick="selectFromDropdown('ratio')">Best/Avg</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="metric-panel active" id="metric-single" data-label-en="Single">
<div id="single-ranking" class="stat-panel active" data-label-en="Current Ranking" data-label-zh="排名">
